commit.message:
Enforce per-operator policy on map, video, and backfill

- PROTECTED operators (Dave) see no track or video in SECRET zones;
  video overlay defaults to shown and is only cleared by live SSE
- Local policy check (canAccessLocally) replaces async unwrap() in SSE
  handler to eliminate race conditions that leaked video to Dave
- feedSegment gated by _videoAllowed flag; showVideoRedacted flushes
  MSE SourceBuffer so buffered frames cannot play under the overlay
- Backfill filtered to current mission run by ingest_ts; mission_id
  filter added to exclude previous-run frames with same mission ID
- Dave's map shows individual restricted outlines per SECRET zone
  (UK_BASE circle, EXERCISE_CORRIDOR rect, TARGET_AREA circle) so
  TRANSIT airspace between zones is visually distinct
- CORRIDOR_BOX tightened to match actual telemetry zone boundaries

commit.message:
feat: support 2-arg range in metal parallel/simd loops; add npbench tests

- gen_kernel_launch: handle range(low, up) — thread count = (up-low)[*SIMD_WIDTH]
- gen_device_code: emit i = grid_id[/SIMD_WIDTH] + low for 2-arg ranges;
  remove niters skip so all val_map vars are passed uniformly as buffers
- rewrite_simd_loops: fix 2-arg simd range(low, up) to start at lane+low
  (was incorrectly starting at lane, causing out-of-bounds writes for j=0)
- Add npbench tests: fdtd_2d, floyd_warshall, jacobi_1d, syr2k

feat: add SearchSpiralGuard to detect and block repeated search_grep calls (#58)

Extract the ad-hoc search spiral detection from implementer/debugger into
a reusable SearchSpiralGuard class in context_compressor.py. The guard
tracks file paths discovered by previous grep results and, when
search_grep is called more than 3 times within the last 6 tool calls,
blocks the search with a directive to call `think` and `read_file` on
specific previously-discovered files instead.

Applied consistently across all 6 agent loops: implementer, debugger,
archivist, security, release, and task_writer.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TBRJjLTMZxRbT2SYxWmDHR

Major site overhaul: homepage redesign, content audit, SEO strategy, feedback fix

Homepage (index.astro):
- Complete rewrite: 2354 → 1180 lines
- Fixed all wrong drug prices (Wegovy, Mounjaro, Ozempic)
- Removed fake testimonials, duplicate sections, dead CSS
- Added Expert Team (E-E-A-T), FAQ with JSON-LD, Newsletter
- Added MedicalWebPage structured data
- Updated all 2025 references to 2026

FeedbackSection:
- Replaced non-functional Tawk.to chat with email contact
- Survey + Testimonial now submit to Supabase (user_feedback table)
- Removed fake stats, added honest reassurance messaging

Content corrections (30+ articles):
- Fixed drug prices across all treatment guides
- Corrected reimbursement info (Wegovy/Mounjaro NOT reimbursed)
- Removed Zepbound references (doesn't exist in France)
- Updated dates from 2025 to 2026

New features:
- Budget dashboard (admin/budget.astro)
- Integration agent workflow
- Migration 009: user_feedback table for client-side forms

SEO & docs:
- Created STRATEGIE-SEO.md with keyword targeting plan
- Created AUDIT.md with full content audit results
- Archived 7 obsolete documentation files

commit.message:
ci: Add Void Linux Build Pipeline (#37)

* ci: add Void Linux build pipeline

Add build-void.yml standalone workflow and integrate void-linux job
into the main build.yml workflow. Uses ghcr.io/void-linux/void-glibc-full
container with the same meson configuration as other distros.

Also update clone URL in void jobs to use github.server_url/github.repository
so it works on forks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: fix Void Linux deps - replace g++ with base-devel

Void Linux doesn't have a standalone g++ package. Use base-devel
meta-package which includes gcc, g++, make, and other build essentials.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: add bash to Void Linux deps

The void-glibc-full container only has dash/sh. Steps using
`shell: bash` need bash explicitly installed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: add glslang to Void Linux deps

meson setup requires glslangValidator for Vulkan shader compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: produce proper xbps package for Void Linux

Replace raw tarball with xbps-create to build a proper .xbps package
that can be installed via xbps-install. Includes repo index via
xbps-rindex so users can use it as a local repository.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: fix xbps version format - replace hyphens with dots

xbps-create requires version without hyphens (e.g. 26.1.0.devel_1
not 26.1.0-devel_1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: add Void Linux job to build-turnip workflow

Add void-linux job that builds Vulkan-only (unpatched) Mesa from
lfdevs/mesa-for-android-container on turnip-main, packaged as .xbps
for Void Linux aarch64.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: fix void-linux turnip build - remove non-existent xbps-devel dep

xbps-devel does not exist in Void Linux repos. The turnip build
packages as a tarball so it is not needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: fix void-linux turnip build - add missing libxshmfence-devel dep

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: emit tar.gz instead of xbps for Void Linux in combined workflows

The standalone distro workflows (build-debian, build-ubuntu, build-fedora,
build-void) emit native packages (.deb, .rpm, .xbps). The combined workflows
(build.yml, build-turnip.yml) emit tar.gz for consistency. This aligns the
Void Linux jobs in combined workflows with the other jobs in those workflows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Add multi-source verification, 25-indicator risk scoring, and full dashboard

Risk scoring (25+ indicators, 5 categories):
- Fiscal: TVA, e-Factura, inactive status, split TVA, debts
- Financial: revenue trend, profitability, margins, liquidity, debt ratio
- Legal: court cases, insolvency, plaintiff/defendant analysis
- Operational: company age, contact info, CAEN
- Governance: registration status, address quality, data completeness
- Letter grades A-F, Romanian summary generation

New pages:
- Company results: 5-tab UI (overview, risk indicators, financials, court cases, fiscal)
- Monitoring: company tracking with 10 alert types, real-time feed
- Reports: portfolio analytics, risk distribution, top risky companies
- AI Assistant: chat interface with mock responses
- Settings: company profile, notifications, subscription, API access

commit.message:
fix: only link snapshots to sampled traces

Add isSampled() check alongside isValid() when extracting trace context
for snapshots. Prevents snapshots from linking to traces that were never
exported due to sampling rate < 1.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

モーダル内でEnter押下時にフォーカスが表示ラベルにリセットされるバグを修正

根本原因: onCloseが毎レンダリングで新しい関数参照を生成するため、
handleKeyDown→useEffectの依存チェーンが毎レンダリングで再実行され、
requestAnimationFrame内のfirstFocusable.focus()がフォーカスをリセットしていた。

修正: onCloseをuseRefで保持し、handleKeyDownの依存配列から除外。
これによりuseEffectはisOpen変更時のみ実行される。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

루트 div의 overflow-hidden 제거로 팝업 정상 표시

commit.message:
feat(excel): smart header detection and data block splitting

Replace naive row-0-is-header assumption with findHeaderRow() scoring
heuristic that skips title/spacer rows and detectDataBlocks() that
splits side-by-side tables at empty-column gaps. Parse/import endpoints
now return detected tables (not raw tabs), and the UI shows tables
grouped by sheet with per-table selection.

Fixes: report-style Excel files (e.g., title rows, shifted headers,
multiple tables per sheet) now import correctly instead of failing
with "no recognizable headers" or producing useless single-column data.
